v1.0.0.description:
# Q-AP v1.0 - Public Playtest
**Info** [Game Page](<https://github.com/cxve/q-ap-world/blob/main-q-up/worlds/q_up/docs/en_Q-UP.md>) - [Setup Guide](<https://github.com/cxve/q-ap-world/blob/main-q-up/worlds/q_up/docs/setup_en.md>)
**Downloads** [World](<https://github.com/cxve/q-ap-world/releases/>) - [Mod](<https://github.com/cxve/q-ap-mod/releases/>)
## Disclaimer
The project status is **playable, but unstable**! If you are interested in reporting bugs and writing feedback, feel free to give this release a try. Otherwise better wait for a more stable version. You can share your bugs and feedback either here on Discord or on GitHub. Your help is greatly appreciated!
## Known Issues
- Some seeds may generate impossible or extremely grindy worlds, please share your experiences so we can improve it together!
## Location checks already available
- Rank & Level ups
- Shop Upgrades
- Challengesanity
## Items already available
- All skills (item pool depends on chosen champ)
- All shop upgrades
- Crystals, Corruption Shards, Upgrade Points, Gold
